---
title: "About"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/YannDupis
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yanndupis
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/yanndupis

---

I’m a Staff AI engineer interested in building and understanding reliable AI systems. My recent work spans multimodal LLM applications, evaluation, model optimization, retrieval, and inference infrastructure. Earlier in my career, I worked on privacy-preserving machine learning and helped build [TF Encrypted](https://github.com/tf-encrypted/tf-encrypted) and [Moose](https://github.com/tf-encrypted/moose).

I use this blog to share practical experiments and lessons across training, evaluation, inference, and production.

Outside of work, you can usually find me surfing at Ocean Beach (I grew up in a surf town in southwestern France), playing jazz guitar, indoor rock climbing, or looking for a good pastrami on rye in the Bay Area.
